title: Unable to select a sheet in Google Sheets Trigger
symptom: The Google Sheets trigger does not load the list of sheets, preventing selection. This occurs even after enabling the necessary APIs.
applies_when: APIs for Google Drive and Google Sheets are enabled
not_this_if: The trigger works with a direct spreadsheet link
root_cause: The error occurs because a link to a Google Drive file was provided instead of a direct link to the Google Sheets spreadsheet. The Google Sheets Trigger requires a specific format to access the sheet list.
fix_steps: Ensure you have the correct link to the Google Sheets spreadsheet
Enable the 'Cloud Resource Manager API' in your Google Cloud project
agent_instruction: Provide a direct link to the Google Sheets spreadsheet and enable the Cloud Resource Manager API.
